issues.issue: Communication_Properties in 'with' clause of public package section is a predeclared property set and is not needed.
left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'real' and '<error>', but must be of the same type
named thing must be an expression with a type
It is recommended that guarantee statements be named. (Hint: an identifier may be placed between the "guarantee" keyword and the quoted description.)
